parsed.availability_comment: Trade completed; workload/fitness still carries some uncertainty after prior heel surgery and knee swelling update.
parsed.availability_note: Recent evidence says he proved fitness in domestic cricket, but fitness/workload remains a live issue and no clear pre-IPL 2026 all-clear was found.
parsed.followup_reason: Need latest March/April 2026 preseason confirmation on match fitness/selection readiness; available reporting is positive but not definitive.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Selection competition is within LSG's Indian pace group, not overseas balance.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot cap is irrelevant.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Official trade-in and projects as first-choice Indian seamer if fit; no firm XI confirmation found.
